opinion.h: Elmer W. KELLEY and The General Street Signal Corporation, petitioners, v. The CITY OF ATLANTIC CITY and Harry Bacharach.* No. 304.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Martin Conboy, of New York City, and Harold E. Stonebraker, of Rochester, N. Y., for petitioners.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Third Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 303 U.S. 666, 58 S. Ct. 520, 82 L.Ed. --; Second petition for rehearing denied 304 U.S. 588, 58 S. Ct. 1036, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Kelley v. Atlantic City 302 U.S. 722 (1937) ]
